category_sources: source_facts.description says Java server to share and edit geospatial data; official GeoServer repository describes a server for publishing geospatial data via open standards.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository use GeoServer capitalization; source_facts.name is geoserver.
docs_sources: Official docs.geoserver.org landing page provides User Manual, Developer Guide, Documentation Guide, and API Reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GeoServer developer documentation identifies https://github.com/geoserver/geoserver as the source code location and canonical repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GeoServer repository describe Java geospatial publishing, OGC standards, WMS, WFS, and mapping support.
